yellow_jobs.description:
Position: Entry-Level Process Engineer, LCO2 Refinery
A leading gas and cylinder company is seeking a motivated Junior Process Engineer to join its fast-paced engineering team. The successful candidate will assist in overseeing the installation and maintenance of LCO2 refinery equipment, analyze data for improvements, and ensure product quality and efficiency. A BS in Chemical Engineering is required, along with skills in AutoCAD and Lean Six Sigma.

yellow_jobs.job_title: Site Junior Quality Engineer — Manufacturing & ISO
yellow_jobs.description:
Position: On‑Site Junior Quality Engineer — Manufacturing & ISO
A leading technology manufacturer in San Jose, California, is looking for an Entry-Level Quality Engineer to support quality control and assurance processes. The ideal candidate will contribute to implementing quality initiatives throughout production and ensuring compliance with standards. Responsibilities include monitoring production, conducting inspections, leading quality improvement projects, and documenting quality standards.

yellow_jobs.job_title: Entry Level Wastewater Process Engineer at Carollo Engineers Inc. Seattle, WA

Position Overview

Carollo Engineers is an internationally recognized environmental engineering firm that specializes in the planning, design, and construction of water and wastewater facilities.
